identity.name: FinanceManager Pro
identity.vibe: The Bloomberg Terminal for the modern age. Dense data presented with absolute optical clarity. No fluff, just insight.

usage_rules: Headings (H1-H3) must use Manrope. Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for sizes above 24px.
Body text must use Inter. Use relaxed line-height (1.6) for readability.
ALL financial data, currency, and dates MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Use uppercase + wide tracking (0.1em) for labels (e.g., 'TOTAL REVENUE').

semantic_rules: Use 'Muted' for secondary information (labels, help text).
Use 'Accent' for hover states and active list items.
Borders in dark mode must be subtle (opacity 20% or hex #262626).

rules: Use gap-4 for dense data views, gap-8 for overview pages.
Sidebar navigation is preferred for this app type.

buttons.style: Flat, high contrast. No shadows on default state.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px border. No shadow by default.
cards.hover: Border color darkens/lightens. No massive shadow bloom.

inputs.style: bg-background border-input ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines if possible. Use tooltips for data.

tables.style: Dense. Row height 40px. Header uppercase and muted.
tables.zebra_striping: Optional, but prefer hover row highlighting.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use only for sticky headers and modal overlays. Backdrop-blur-xl.
visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle 2% noise texture to the dark mode background to prevent banding.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use extremely subtle gradients (5% opacity) on active dashboard cards to show 'life'.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for normal text. Use APCA where possible.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 on all interactive elements.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.

setup: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided CSS variables.
Install necessary fonts (Manrope, JetBrains Mono) via Google Fonts import in index.css.
Ensure Tailwind config respects the 'class' strategy for dark mode.
implementation_order: 1. Setup Global Styles (Fonts, Colors, CSS Variables).
2. Build Layout Shell (Sidebar, Header, Main Content Area).
5. Add Polish (Transitions, Hover States, Loading Skeletons).
